entry.title: IDC W15P7T11DG402 (P00290) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS C4 SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION (P00290), IS TO INCORPORATE CHS-4 TECHNICAL INSERTION/FIRM FIXED PRICE PROPOSAL 5346 (WIN132), TO THE PRODUCT BASELINE IN ACCORDANCE WITH FAR 52.243-1 CHANGES-FIXED PRICE. THE ADDITION OF THESE ITEMS TO THE CHS-4 PRODUCT BASELINE IS A ADMINISTRATIVE ACTION. ACTUAL QUANTITIES WILL BE PURCHASED UNDER INDIVIDUAL DELIVERY ORDERS.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: ALL OTHER MISCELLANEOUS ELECTRICAL EQUIPMENT AND COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T11DG402 (P00291) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS C4 SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION (P00291), UNDER CONTRACT W15P7T-11-D-G402, IS ISSUED IN ACCORDANCE WITH FAR 52.243-1 CHANGES-FIXED PRICE TO INCORPORATE CHS-4 TECHNICAL INSERTION/FIRM FIXED PRICE PROPOSAL 5410(FSC022) TO THE PRODUCT BASELINE. THE FOLLOWING ITEM WILL BE ADDED: V1 1TB SATA DRIVE W/ CARRIER, M6800

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: ALL OTHER MISCELLANEOUS ELECTRICAL EQUIPMENT AND COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T11DG402 (P00292) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS C4 SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MOD IS TO ADD TWO (2) CONFIGURATIONS OF THE COMMERCIAL V1+ CISCO 4331 INTEGRATED SERVICES ROUTER (ISR) AND FOUR (4) NETWORK INTERFACE MODULES TO THE CHS-4 CONTRACT BASELINE.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W15P7T11DG402 (P00299) awarded to GENERAL DYNAMICS C4 SYSTEMS, INC., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: ORDER CONSISTS OF THE FOLLOWING PARTS: V1 CISCO TELEPRESENCE MCU 5320 (CTI-5320-MCU-K9) WITH AES AND HTTPS OPTION FOR MCU 5300 SERIES (LIC-AESMCU53-K9), SOFTWARE IMAGE FOR MCU 5300 SERIES (SW-5300-MCU-K9), LICENSE KEY FOR MCU 5320 SOFTWARE IMAGE (LIC-5320-MCU-K9), AND US POWER CORD (PWR-CORD-US-C). INCLUDES 1 FULL HD / 2 HD / 4 SD PORTS ON MCU 5300 SERIES (L-5300-4PL, QTY 10) AND CHS-4 5 YEAR WARRANTY, V1 CISCO TELEPRESENCE MCU 5320 (CTI-5320-MCU-K9) WITH AES AND HTTPS OPTION FOR MCU 5300 SERIES (LIC-AESMCU53-K9), SOFTWARE IMAGE FOR MCU 5300 SERIES (SW-5300-MCU-K9), LICENSE KEY FOR MCU 5320 SOFTWARE IMAGE (LIC-5320-MCU-K9), AND US POWER CORD (PWR-CORD-US-C). INCLUDES 1 FULL HD / 2 HD / 4 SD PORTS ON MCU 5300 SERIES (L-5300-4PL, QTY 10) AND CHS-4 5 YEAR WARRANTY, V1 CISCO 4-PORT VOICE AND FAX NETWORK INTERFACE MODULE FXS, FXS-E AND DID, FOR ISR 4000 SERIES. INCLUDES CHS-4 5 YEAR WARRANTY, V1 CISCO 4-PORT VOICE AND FAX NETWORK INTERFACE MODULE FXS, FXS-E AND DID, FOR ISR 4000 SERIES. INCLUDES OEM WARRANTY WITH RSC SUPPORT, V1 CISCO TELEPRESENCE VIRTUAL VCS CONTROL INCLUDING VCS ADVANCED ACCOUNT SECURITY (LIC-VCS-JITC), VIDEO COMMUNICATION SERVER, GATEWAY FEATURE (LIC-VCS-GW), 100 TRAVERSAL CALLS (LIC-VCSE-100) , SOFTWARE IMAGE (SW-VCS-8.X-K9), VCS FINDME APPLICATION (LIC-VCS-FINDME+), SOFTWARE RELEASE KEY (LIC-SW-VMVCS-K9), CONFIG ONLY E-DELIVERY (LIC-VVCS-C-PAK), AND 20 ADDITIONAL NON-TRAVERSAL NETWORK CALLS (LIC-VCS-20). INCLUDES OEM WARRANTY ONLY (NO RSC SUPPORT), V1 CISCO TELEPRESENCE VIRTUAL VCS EXPRESSWAY INCLUDING SOFTWARE RELEASE KEY (LIC-SW-VMVCS-K9), 1800 TURN RELAY OPTION (LIC-VCS-1800TURN), GATEWAY FEATURE (LIC-VCS-GW), ENABLE EXPRESSWAY FEATURE (LIC-VCSE-E), CONFIG ONLY E-DELIVERY (LIC-VVCS-E-PAK), AUTOEXPAND USE ONLY VCS ADVANCED NETWORKING (LIC-VCS-DI+), SOFTWARE IMAGE (SW-VCS-8.X-K9), AND 20 TRAVERSAL NETWORK CALLS (LIC-VCSE-20). INCLUDES OEM WARRANTY ONLY (NO RSC SUPPORT), ACANO VIRTUAL MULTIPOINT CONTROL UNIT (MCU) WITH 25 COSPACE USER LICENSES AND 5 YEARS OF ACANO MAINTENANCE, AND ACANO VIRTUAL MULTIPOINT CONTROL UNIT (MCU) WITH 25 COSPACE USER LICENSES AND 1 YEAR OF ACANO MAINTENANCE.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: ALL OTHER MISCELLANEOUS ELECTRICAL EQUIPMENT AND COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
